item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: In the object description it says that the vehicles reappear within 3-25 hours, but in the first log, bravo are said to reappear after 39 hours.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Late reply, but I'm sure it was just another day on the job for Lambada-5.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Okay then… Heads with legs, candle-people, sudden decapitation… all in all, Alfa and Bravo are handling it pretty damn well.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
Several anomalous humanoid entities, collectively designated SCP-3087-1, appear aboard the vehicle as it travels (a list of all observed instances can be found in Document-3087-04).

I think it would be better if there is at least a bit more description of the humanoids up front, so that we have something to imagine properly.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: That final conversation was what tipped me over the line into upvoting.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: That second exploration log is some grade-A awesome shit. :D Creepy and unsettling as all fuck!

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
This is wonderful! For some reason I had visuals from Spirited Away in my mind as I was reading.
+1

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: That's a valid nitpick. It has to be mass transit carrying more than a certain number of people.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: I will admit that I had to contrive a reason as to how the Foundation got the head. In author headcanon (pun intended), an uncooperative customer got belligerent with one of the candles and killed it during a Foundation exploration, and the Foundation brought the body back with them to our reality.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: I liked it quite a lot. One little nit: In the Containment Procedures, you mention that all vehicles with over 10 people need to be diverted, while in the Description you only talk about overnight mass transirt vehicles. What about stuffed RVs? What about buses with only two people on them?

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
A little more wouldn't hurt 😊

Also how in the world did they get that head!!!

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: the imagery presented here is wonderfully creepy. While I would love to learn more about those worlds they.visited I feel that just enough information is presented to keep me wondering.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: That final interaction between the task force members was excellent. Simultaneously professional and emotional in a way that perfectly fit the situation. Well done.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
Thanks everyone who gave feedback in chat, particularly Icepick for our nice long conversation. This is my first article, in, uh, three years.

Image in article is from Wikimedia, under a Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International license. At least, that's what Wikimedia tells me.

Also, happy seven year SCPbirthday to me.
